name: White Almond Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese until smooth and soft using an electric mixer set to "cream" speed, or beat with a spoon.
2. Slowly blend in the remaining ingredients.
3. Press the mixture into a buttered 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
4. Chill until firm, then cut into 21 pieces.
5. Makes about 1 pound.
Variation: Coconut White Fudge
- Substitute 1/2 cup flaked or cookie coconut for almonds.
- This will make 21 pieces.
